llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' section: (1) Item 12.10 pulled entirely - not to be discussed at this meeting, deferred to August 10th meeting; (2) Items 12.11 through 12.14 moved to consent agenda; (3) Staff recognition added as new item 6.0, placed before bond program items under School and Community Reports section
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the consent items
